<!--
Thank you for contributing to Clarity.V. A few prompts to help your PR land:
-->

## What this PR does

A clear sentence or two about the change.

## Why

The problem it solves, or the use case it enables.

## How it's verified

What did you actually run to prove this works?

```bash
# paste the command(s)
```

And what was the output? (paste it, or describe what changed.)

## Tests

- [ ] `pytest tests/` is green on my machine
- [ ] If I changed engine behavior, I added or updated a test
- [ ] If I added a platform or backend, I manually verified it on my hardware

## Docs

- [ ] If user-visible behavior changed, I updated the relevant doc (README / ARCHITECTURE / PRIVACY / TRAINING / etc.)

## License

By submitting this PR I confirm I have the right to license the code I'm contributing under MIT.
